option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="gallery-form-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.GalerieFormController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" styleClass="section-title" text="Ajouter une galerie" />
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Nom *" /> <TextField fx:id="nomField" promptText="Nom de la galerie" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Adresse *" /> <TextField fx:id="adresseField" promptText="Adresse" /> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Localisation *" /> <TextField fx:id="localisationField" promptText="Ville / zone" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Capacite max *" /> <TextField fx:id="capaciteField" promptText="Ex: 120" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="4" promptText="Description de la galerie" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="8.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCancelClick" styleClass="secondary-action-button" text="Fermer" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSaveClick" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Enregistrer" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="gallery-form-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.GalerieFormController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" styleClass="section-title" text="Ajouter une galerie" />
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Nom *" /> <TextField fx:id="nomField" promptText="Nom de la galerie" styleClass="gallery-search-field" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Adresse *" /> <TextField fx:id="adresseField" promptText="Adresse" styleClass="gallery-search-field" /> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Localisation *" /> <TextField fx:id="localisationField" promptText="Ville / zone" styleClass="gallery-search-field" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Capacite max *" /> <TextField fx:id="capaciteField" promptText="Ex: 120" styleClass="gallery-search-field" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="4" promptText="Description de la galerie" styleClass="gallery-form-text-area" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="validationErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="form-validation-error" visible="false" wrapText="true" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="8.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCancelClick" prefWidth="120.0" styleClass="secondary-action-button" text="Fermer" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSaveClick" prefWidth="120.0" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Enregistrer" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
